pitch_points.claim: Chandigarh University is a good option for students.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: To aapke liye Chandigarh University aap dekh sakti ho.
pitch_points.translation: So you can consider Chandigarh University.

pitch_points.claim: Total tuition fees are 7,34,000.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Total tuition fees jo jayega woh 7,34,000 ka aapka yahan pe jayega.
pitch_points.translation: The total tuition fees will be 7,34,000.

pitch_points.claim: Including hostel, total expense is around 9 lakh.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Aapka total expense chala jayega yahan pe including hostel and tuition fees.
pitch_points.translation: Your total expense here will be including hostel and tuition fees.

pitch_points.claim: Chandigarh University has NAAC accreditation A+.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: NAAC accreditation A+ hai.
pitch_points.translation: It has NAAC accreditation A+.

pitch_points.claim: Placement rating is approximately 4.1 out of 5.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Placement rating aapki approx out of five 4.1 ki rating yahan pe mili hui hai.
pitch_points.translation: The placement rating here is approximately 4.1 out of five.

pitch_points.claim: Highest package for Data Science and AI was 54 lakh.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Highest jo gaya tha woh 54 ka gaya tha.
pitch_points.translation: The highest package that went was 54 lakh.

pitch_points.claim: Average package for AI and ML is 20 lakh.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Average inka 20 ka hai.
pitch_points.translation: Their average is 20 lakh.

pitch_points.claim: Chandigarh University has its own entrance exam, CUCET.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Inka khud ka entrance exam hota hai, CUCET.
pitch_points.translation: They have their own entrance exam, CUCET.

pitch_points.claim: Scholarships are available up to 100%.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: 40% se aapke scholarship start ho jaate hain aur up to 100% tak ka aap scholarship yahan se le sakte hain.
pitch_points.translation: Scholarships start from 40% and you can get up to 100% scholarship here.

pitch_points.claim: 54 lakh ka highest package jata hai domestic ke liye aur international ke liye aapka 1.5 CR ka jata hai.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Placement bhi kafi achha hai iska, placement ki agar main baat karu to aapka 54 lakh ka highest package jata hai domestic ke liye aur international ke liye aapka 1.5 CR ka jata hai.
pitch_points.translation: The placement is quite good, the highest package goes up to 54 lakhs for domestic and 1.5 crores for international.

pitch_points.claim: Aapko pata hoga Chandigarh University ka CUCET ka exam hota hai jo ki aapka home based exam hai ghar baithe aap apne kisi bhi device se exam de sakte hain.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Aapko pata hoga Chandigarh University ka CUCET ka exam hota hai jo ki aapka home based exam hai ghar baithe aap apne kisi bhi device se exam de sakte hain.
pitch_points.translation: You would know that Chandigarh University has the CUCET exam, which is a home-based exam that you can take from any device at home.

pitch_points.claim: Up to 100% tak ka aap scholarship bhi le sakte hain yahan se.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Theek hai aur iske alawa up to 100% tak ka aap scholarship bhi le sakte hain yahan se.
pitch_points.translation: Additionally, you can get up to 100% scholarship from here.

pitch_points.claim: Out of five isko 4.1 ki rating mili hui hai.

pitch_points.translation: For the general MBA, the fee will be 6,78,000, and you can also use your Bihar credit card for admission through DRCC.
